title: N.E.W.T.-Level Work
prose: Your N.E.W.T. classes are barely a dozen students each now, small enough that there's nowhere to hide if you haven't done the reading. It suits you better than you expected — less noise, more room to actually think.

{{dada-professor}} sets an essay on advanced counter-jinxes that takes you the better part of a weekend, and for the first time it occurs to you that this is genuinely useful, not just something to pass.

choices.label: Hand it in a full day early, for once.
